summary_en: Seasonal official racing calendar coverage through Qatar Racing and Equestrian Club. Public timetable output is capped at A.
summary_ja: Qatar Racing and Equestrian Clubの季節開催型公式日程を扱う。公開時刻表はAまでとする。

summary_en: Official federation, news and club-video routes are known, but no reusable advance national timetable is confirmed.
summary_ja: 公式連盟・報道・クラブ映像の導線は確認済みだが、再利用可能な全国向け事前時刻表は未確認。

summary_en: Borrowdale Park meeting evidence is available at calendar level, while reliable scheduled post times remain unconfirmed.
summary_ja: Borrowdale Parkの開催資料は日付・競馬場レベルで確認できるが、信頼できる予定発走時刻は未確認。
